name: ema_trace_update
clipping_rule: clip each trace to [-FP_ONE, FP_ONE] for first native gate
purpose: Own the v2.2 fading-memory state on chip using only bounded causal updates.

name: trace_delta_feature
clipping_rule: clip only if emitted into a bounded summary/readout payload
purpose: Preserve v2.2 multi-timescale contrast as a derived feature, not persistent state.

name: novelty_feature
clipping_rule: clip emitted novelty to [-2 * FP_ONE, 2 * FP_ONE]
purpose: Expose causal surprise/novelty without future target leakage.

name: temporal_readout_input
equation_fixed_point: readout consumes fixed-point current, trace, delta, and novelty fields only
clipping_rule: no hidden/tanh recurrent state in Tier 4.31b/4.31c
purpose: Keep the first native migration aligned with the narrowed v2.2 claim.
